title: 构建 ralph run 的结构化关键信号日志系统
summary: 为 ralph run 增加了独立的结构化 run log 工件与 recorder，把故事执行、上下文注入、policy gate、测试摘要、reviewer 评分、自动重构动作和失败信号统一沉淀到 .ralph/run-logs，并对 Copilot 轮询输出做 noise 跳过与计数压缩。
keyDecisions: 把结构化 run log 做成独立的 .ralph/run-logs 工件，而不是继续堆叠在 progress.txt 或现有 artifact schema 里。
通过 extension orchestration 主链主动记录高价值事件，并把 output channel 文本按 signal、diagnostic、noise 分类，而不是事后全量解析文本日志。
对 Copilot 轮询与最小等待类输出只保留 skippedNoise 计数，不逐条持久化，避免 run log 被低价值噪音淹没。
patternsUsed: synthesized vs copilot artifact source tagging
constraintsConfirmed: prd.json remained read-only during task execution.
The existing output channel remained user-visible and was not replaced.
Relevant validation commands were run before completion.
risks: Structured run logging now touches src/extension.ts, so future orchestration changes must keep recorder phase transitions aligned.
Noise classification currently uses heuristics over output-channel messages and may need tuning if log wording changes.
followUps: 让 evidence、checkpoint 或 knowledge-check 在需要时直接读取最新 run log 的 summary sections，而不是重复执行部分推导逻辑。
如果后续增加更多执行阶段，可把 StoryRunLogPhase 扩展为更细粒度的枚举并补充消费方测试。
